summary: Iteration 280 - SYNC-01 (RecursiveRegistryStore), Visual Bloom, AUD-01, MEM-01 Testing. ALL FEATURES WORKING: SYNC-01 atomic state broadcasts detected on depth changes ('[SYNC-01] Depth broadcast: 1'). Visual Bloom jade-colored radial gradient visible on cell selection (screenshot confirms green glow). AUD-01 Acoustic Bloom correctly gates audio until 200ms dwell threshold. MEM-01 localStorage persistence saves/restores tesseract_anchor with depth, address, path.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error repeatedly - KNOWN PRE-EXISTING issue
integration_issues.details: This error indicates a useEffect dependency issue causing infinite re-renders. Does not break functionality but impacts performance.

critical_code_review_comments: RecursiveRegistryStore.js: SYNC-01 implementation correct - useSyncExternalStore pattern with atomic state updates and version counter
DwellBloomIndicator.js: Visual Bloom component with jade gradient (rgba(0, 168, 107)) and pop effect on threshold
useTesseractCore.js: dwellProgress state tracking (0-1) for Visual Bloom, isDwellStable for AUD-01 gate
TesseractExperience.js: DwellBloomIndicatorSimple integrated in TesseractLattice cells

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All SYNC-01, Visual Bloom, AUD-01, MEM-01 features working

context_for_next_testing_agent: SYNC-01, Visual Bloom, AUD-01, MEM-01 all tested and working. The 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React error is a KNOWN PRE-EXISTING issue. TesseractExperience at /tesseract is the main test page.

SYNC-01_atomic_state_broadcasts.details: RecursiveRegistryStore broadcasts depth/gravity/voidMode changes atomically. Console shows '[SYNC-01] Depth broadcast: 1' after dive.

visual_bloom_jade_gradient.details: Jade-colored radial gradient visible on cell selection. DwellBloomIndicatorSimple renders with rgba(0, 168, 107) base color. Screenshot confirms green glow on selected cell.

visual_bloom_200ms_threshold.details: dwellProgress tracks 0-1 progress during 200ms dwell. Bloom 'pops' when isDwellStable becomes true.

AUD-01_acoustic_bloom_dwell_gate.details: Audio ONLY plays after 200ms dwell stability. Console shows '[TesseractCore] Dwell threshold reached - audio bloom permitted' and '[AUD-01] Acoustic Bloom triggered - stillness achieved'

MEM-01_localStorage_persistence.details: tesseract_anchor saves to localStorage with depth, address, path, isVoidMode, gravity, dwellMap, savedAt. Verified depth: 1, address: 011110|0111 after dive.

tesseract_page_renders.details: TesseractExperience page renders at /tesseract with data-testid='tesseract-experience'

cell_selection_visual_feedback.details: Click selects cell with visual highlight and Visual Bloom indicator

double_click_dive.details: Double-click on cell dives to next depth level

gravity_slider.details: Gravity slider found with data-testid='gravity-slider', initial value 0.5 (SOURCE)

console_logs_verified: [TesseractCore] Dwell threshold reached - audio bloom permitted

console_errors.impact: Performance degradation but does not break functionality
